channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Furniture & baby seat dumped, 19th May
item.description:
A baby seat & 3 chairs have been left outside 68 Tormount rd.Baby car seat over a week & chairs 24 hours

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tormount Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yet another f*ing fridge freezer dumped, 19th May
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stockwell Avenue, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big piece of a furniture, 19th May
item.description:
Piece of a furniture

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochester Way Relief Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on cabinet, 19th May
item.description:
A black cabinet on the footway near the traffic signal cabinet at the junction of Camberwell New Rd and Foxley Rd has white graffiti tagging on it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camberwell New Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Driveway and fire access blocked, 19th May
item.description:
Double yellow blips and emergency access blocked
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uncollected waste / flytipping, 19th May
item.description:
Hi - I live near the railings on barnabas road and large household waste has been there since last week. This is opposite my home and is quite unsightly & unhygienic (old sofa) and being used for dumping ground of more rubbish.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnabas Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lamp out, 19th May
item.description:
The street lamp outside No.30 is out Now providing insufficient lighting on the foot path leading to an alleyway

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Red Barracks Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Unwanted Sofa Dumped on Pavement, 19th May
item.description:
A large unwanted sofa has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waverley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Chairs and Box of Rubbish Dumped on Pavement, 19th May
item.description:
Unwanted chairs and a box of rubbish have been left dumped on the pavement outside number 68. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waverley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Furniture Dumped on Pavement, 19th May
item.description:
An item of broken furniture has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 110. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Textiles Dumped on Kerbside, 19th May
item.description:
Unwanted textiles, some in bags, have been left dumped on the kerbside. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Desk Fan Dumped on Pavement, 19th May
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead

item.title: Bag of Rubbish Dumped Under Tree, 19th May
item.description:
A bag of rubbish has been left dumped under the tree opposite number 16. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead

item.title: Broken Furniture Dumped on Turfed Area, 19th May
item.description:
A large item of broken furniture has been left dumped on the turfed area. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Orchard Road, Plumstead

item.title: Unwanted Furniture Dumped on Path, 19th May
item.description:
Several items of unwanted furniture have been left dumped on the path outside number 10. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southport Road, Plumstead

item.title: Broken Furniture and Unwanted Carpet Dumped on Path, 19th May
item.description:
Broken furniture and several rolls of unwanted carpet have been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southport Road, Plumstead

item.title: Unwanted Mattress Dumped on Path, 19th May
item.description:
An unwanted mattress has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elmley Street, Plumstead

item.title: Broken Furniture Dumped on Pavement, 19th May
item.description:
Several items of broken furniture have been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waverley Road, Plumstead

item.title: Flytipping by food waste at Fareshares, 19th May
item.description:
More flytipping between food waste bin and bike locker AGAIN. Please investigate and put some blockage to stop this. It’s almost every day. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, Crampton Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The street has not been cleaned, 19th May
item.description:
Just because you update a status to cleaned doesn't mean it's been actually cleaned. The whole street has broken glass and loose debris all over it it needs to be swept. Look at the photo of my tyres where I moved my car from 1 side of the rd to the other

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Morpeth Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
